parsed.production_notes: The video combines human-recorded footage with an AI-generated avatar. The AI avatar exhibits an uncanny, overly smooth appearance, unnaturally large eyes, and maintains a perfectly static pose throughout her scene.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Long brown hair styled in a side braid. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a white long-sleeve button-up shirt in the first scene, and a light blue v-neck scrub top in the second scene.

characters.appearance: Young adult female appearance, fair complexion. Red hair pulled back, large brown eyes, smooth skin.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, calm, but static and slightly uncanny.

scenes.setting: Busy city street at night, heavy traffic, neon signs.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is sitting on the back of a moving motorcycle at night, holding the camera in a selfie style. She has long brown hair in a braid and wears a white long-sleeve shirt. The motorcycle driver in front of her wears a bright green helmet and jacket. The background is a busy city street with heavy traffic, bright neon signs, and streetlights. The lighting is a mix of streetlights and neon glow. Character A is energetic and smiling widely.

scenes.visual_description: A selfie-style shot of a woman riding on the back of a motorcycle through a bustling city at night. Text overlays appear on screen as she speaks, crossing out common English phrases.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Stop saying I'm fine, thanks, I don't know, you're welcome. It's very basic.
Character A says: I used to speak the same way.
Character A says: Then my friend suggested practicing with Loora.
Character A says: Let me show you.
scenes.on_screen_text:

I'm fine, thanks

scenes.setting: Left: neutral background. Right: inside a car during the day.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character B, a young woman with red hair and large brown eyes, looks directly at the camera with a friendly, static smile. She wears a grey turtleneck sweater and rests her chin on her hand. The background is a plain, warm-toned wall. The lighting is soft and even.

Character A, a young woman with long brown hair in a braid, sits inside a car during the day. She wears a light blue v-neck top. She looks directly at the camera and speaks. The background shows the interior of the car and a blurred view out the window. The lighting is natural daylight.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen shows an AI avatar on the left and a human woman on the right, engaging in a conversation. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Sorry, my English is not good.
Character B says: You should practice everyday.
Character A says: But I don't have anyone to practice with.
Character B says: That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor.
Character A says: I can speak with you?
Character B says: Yes, I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you get better with every conversation.
Character A says: But I make a lot of mistakes.
Character B says: You don't have to worry about making mistakes because I'll guide you through them.
Character A says: Sounds good.
Character B says: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.
